# Albatrion

> Technical documentation for Albatrion packages

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [@canard](https://vincent-kk.github.io/docs/canard): JSON Schema-based form generation ecosystem for React.
- [API Reference](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/api-reference): import ForAI from '@site/src/components/ForAI';
- [Core Concepts](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/core-concepts): import ForAI from '@site/src/components/ForAI';
- [Auto-Calculated Fields](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/auto-calculation): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';
- [Basic Form](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/basic-form): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';
- [Conditional Registration Form](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/conditional-registration): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';
- [Dynamic Billing Form](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/dynamic-billing): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';
- [Employment Contract Form](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/employment-contract): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';
- [Examples](https://vincent-kk.github.io/docs/canard/schema-form/examples): import ForAI from '@site/src/components/ForAI';
- [Media Registration Form](https://vincent-kk.github.io/albatrion/docs/canard/schema-form/examples/media-registration): import BrowserOnly from '@docusaurus/BrowserOnly';

- [@winglet/data-loader](https://vincent-kk.github.io/docs/winglet/data-loader): import PackageHeader from '@site/src/components/PackageHeader';

- [@winglet/json](https://vincent-kk.github.io/docs/winglet/json): import PackageHeader from '@site/src/components/PackageHeader';
